# Sai Vishnu Vamsi Senagasetty — Portfolio

> AI Engineer / Machine Learning Engineer specializing in RAG systems, LLM deployment, model serving, NLP, and production ML pipelines.

## About

- **Name:** Sai Vishnu Vamsi Senagasetty
- **Title:** AI Engineer, Machine Learning Engineer, Data Science Engineer
- **Location:** Houston, Texas
- **Education:** MS Computer Science, University of Houston (2023–2025); BTech CS, SRM University AP (2019–2023)
- **Email:** saivishnuvamsis07@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/vishnu-senagasetty/

## Core Skills

Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, RAG, LLM Integration, Groq API, LangChain, NLP, Computer Vision, YOLOv5, Whisper, Scikit-learn, Docker, Kubernetes, Azure ML, Apache Airflow, Spark, Model Deployment, Prompt Engineering, Next.js, FastAPI

## Projects

### AI-Powered Portfolio Personal Assistant (Groq + Custom RAG)
Custom RAG chatbot integrated into this portfolio. Uses Groq for fast inference, conversational memory, and Render deployment—no heavy FAISS dependency.
- Tags: AI
- Stack: Groq, RAG, FastAPI, Render, Python, Next.js

### Comparative Analysis of TensorFlow Serving and TorchServe on Azure
Benchmarked CNN and RNN model serving on Azure ML under light, medium, and heavy load. Compared latency, throughput, and reliability.
- Tags: AI, ML
- Stack: TensorFlow Serving, TorchServe, Azure ML, Python

### Energy Provider Churn Analysis
Random Forest churn model at 90% accuracy; identified tenure, usage, and pricing as top predictors.
- GitHub: https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/Energy-Provider-Churn-Analysis

### ImageCraft – Text-to-Image
Custom UNet + transformer attention with Stable Diffusion fine-tuning for Text2Image synthesis.
- GitHub: https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/IMageCraft-Text-to-Image-using-Transformers

### Video Keyword Extraction
MoviePy + Whisper pipeline for educational video transcription and keyword groundwork.
- GitHub: https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/video_keyword_extraction

### Pink Slime Journalism Analysis
NLP clustering over 27,000+ articles to distinguish misleading journalism from legitimate news.
- GitHub: https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/Pink-slime

### Utility Performance Analysis
Oil & gas utility benchmarking; forecasting models with R² up to 0.99 for Texas revenue.
- GitHub: https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/Data-Driven-Analysis-of-Utility-Performance-in-the-Oil-and-Gas-Sector

### Night Objects Detection
YOLOv5 low-light object detection for pedestrians, vehicles, and infrastructure.
- GitHub: https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/Night-Objects---Detection-Using-TensorFlow

## Experience Highlights

- **Software Engineering Fellow** — Develop for Good / Rasdo NGO (2025–Present): Figma-to-production website, Flutterwave API donations

- **Instructional Assistant** — University of Houston (2024–Present): AI-assisted web content workflows
- **NLP Research Assistant** — University of Houston (2024)
